title: Teenage Sex and Death at Camp Miasma review - Gillian Anderson superb in queer slasher spectacular
description: Cannes film festival: Young indie film-maker Kris tracks down Anderson’s Final Girl for a remake of a beloved horror, to find fantasy and reality collapsed
content: Jane Schoenbrun unveils a very enjoyable display of transformative ecstasy and submissive rapture, treating us to a bizarre pop-cultural black mass of fiercely believed-in trash and kink. As before with Schoenbrun’s films, I found myself thinking of ... [3438 chars]

title: The gilt market will hover over any Labour leadership contest
description: The Iran war is the bigger story – but the bond market is primed to deliver a kick if extreme positions arise from a formal race
content: It is a mistake to think every twitch in the price of UK government debt is caused by the latest instalment in the great Labour leadership meltdown. Waiting for Wes is not the only drama in town for your average bond vigilante. Resolution – or not – ... [4205 chars]

title: Italians praise Catherine as they turn out for final day of trip
description: The Princess of Wales shone in front of large crowds in Reggio Emilia on the final day of her tour.
content:
The Princess of Wales's trip to Italy has been a reminder of how much the royals need her star quality.
The visit to Reggio Emilia had been hailed as significant as her first overseas trip since her cancer diagnosis and treatment. It was her comeback... [4312 chars]

title: Starmer tells Plaid first minister he's 'open' to discussing more Senedd powers
description: It comes after a telephone call in which Sir Keir congratulated Rhun ap Iorwerth on becoming first minister.
content:
Sir Keir Starmer has told Wales' new First Minister, Rhun ap Iorwerth, he is "open to a conversation" about giving the Senedd more powers, the Welsh government has said.
It said the Labour prime minister made the comments during a phone call to congr... [2784 chars]

title: Small number of people in Scotland linked to hantavirus outbreak
description: There are no known cases of the virus in Scotland and the risk to public is very low, Public Health Scotland says.
content:
A small number of people in Scotland have been linked to the hantavirus outbreak, according to the national public health body.
A rare strain of hantavirus broke out on the Dutch cruise ship MV Hondius as it sailed from Argentina to Cape Verde.
